title: Chapter 10
content:
Chapter 10: Gym.

Liam had enrolled into the gym and was surprised things were not as hard as he thought, everyone was incredibly friendly with his nose adjusting to the smell.

The trainer was named Mike, he was huge and Liam wouldn’t be surprised if bullets bounced off his body, his muscles were solid.

"One more!" Mike screamed but Liam struggled to raise the weights, he felt like his arms were about to tear off.

He wanted to drop it but he knew Mike wouldn’t like that, the fact that today was focused on the basics.

It was Liam that wanted to lift weights to see how much weight he could lift so Mike could set his base point.

But it was a trap, the moment Liam lifted it, Mike became a different kind of monster.

"T-Take it!" Liam screamed but Mike looked at him with a raised brow.

"Boy, I ain’t spotting you if you don’t lift that shit! You gon’ die!" Mike screamed.

Liam actually believed him, Mike had that look in his eyes and Liam managed to lift.

"Give me one more, bo-!" Before Mike could even complete his sentence, Liam put the weight on the hook.

"YOU MUST BE OUT OF YOUR DAMN MIND!" Liam screamed the moment he managed to free himself from the shackles of the weight.

"Hey, I believed in you. That is all you needed at the end of the day," Mike shrugged.

"You are crazy..." Liam said in disbelief, no one even looked his way telling him this was a normal occurrence in the gym.

"And you are stronger than you were an hour ago," Mike said with a broad smile that made his masculine frame look like it belonged to a child.

"I-I’m sorry, I didn’t mean to shout," Liam was quick to apologize.

"It is fine! I can feel the testosterone oozing off you now!" Mike blurted out.

Liam was done for the day and walked out, he hadn’t felt the effects on his body yet but Liam knew it would hit him like a freight train once his body enters its rest state.

He paid for a month’s subscription with Mike as his trainer, they exchanged information so they could keep in contact outside of the gym.

Liam stepped out and he could take in the fresh air finally, the fresh air made him feel like he had just stepped into a different realm.

"That was... intense," Liam muttered to himself but he was glad he did this, it was different.

But he took a step forward to go to his car; however, a woman approached him from his blindspot, startling him.

"Hey there~" She whispered and Liam jerked his head in her direction so fast.

"H-Hello, what can I help you with?" Liam asked right before regaining his composure.

She looked young, probably in her early to mid-thirties but he looked at her, she handed him his phone.

"You forgot this," The lady said, she was drenched in sweat which meant she just came out of the gym, but Liam peaked at her very revealing gym outfit.

"Oh, clumsy me. Thank you very much," Liam showed his gratitude, taking his phone from her.

"You’re new here, aren’t you?" The lady said and Liam nodded, he didn’t really want to engage in a conversation. All he wanted to do right now was to go home.

"Yup and you must have heard my screams for help. Thank you for helping by the way," Liam joked.

"Hahahah!" The lady laughed a little too hard which made him uncomfortable, Liam took a subtle step back because she felt like one of those people who did too much.

"You’re so funny! I heard you but that is how Mike is with everyone, he is a bit intense," The lady confessed but this also confirmed her status as an active member.

"I’m more surprised he hasn’t gotten anyone hurt," Liam said.

"Well, none survived," The lady fired back and an awkward silence followed.

"Wait what?" Liam questioned with a raised brow.

"I AM KIDDING! HAHAHAH!" The lady laughed her ass off, Liam just stared at her with a raised brow but a chuckle broke through his nonchalant act.

[Ding!]

[New target detected!]

[Target Profile:]

[Name: Sophia Reyes]

[Age: 34]

[Status: Divorced (Single MILF)]

[Attractiveness: 7.9/10 (Mid-Tier)]

[Body Type: Curvy Thick / Athletic]

[Potential ROI: Good (★★★☆☆)]

[Recommended Investment Level: Low to Medium]

"That is funny..." Liam said but his entire personality shifted the moment he found out she was a potential rebate.

He knew he could converse and get to know her now, Liam finally paid attention to how she looked.

She was a beautiful latina, she was thick in all the right places with toned abs and long brunette hair. She didn’t have breasts as big as Rachel but they were still on the big side.

"I forgot to introduce myself, I’m Liam," Liam officially introduced himself to her.

"Hi Liam... I-!" Liam interrupted her before she could finish.

"Wait, let me guess... You look like a... Sophia.." Liam said and her jaw dropped.

"No way! Do I know you?" Sophia questioned right away, squinting her eyes like she was trying to recall a memory.

"C’mon, do you think you would ever forget this handsome face if you did know me?" Liam questioned and Sophia smirked at this response.

It was cocky but in a very good way, Liam knew this one wasn’t like Rachel, Sophia was the opposite as a matter of fact.

She was confident and had built her body into a temple, now Liam had to find a way to infiltrate that temple.
